notes: Miami is market #1 and the technical reference city.
production_allowed: false — license_status must be 'confirmed' before production (footprint + address commercial-use terms must be verified with citations in provenance.json).
pipeline_status: viewer_ready — 108 tiles, all GLBs complete.
viewer_status: viewer_ready — Miami is the Phase 1 viewer pilot (BIKINI export).
license_status: needs_review — Miami-Dade County open data footprint license not yet verified for commercial use (gis-mdc.opendata.arcgis.com). Address (GeoAddress) terms not yet reviewed.
Zero-building tiles missing per-tile GLBs are INFO, not blocking WARN, when production_ready and viewer_ready are both true.
